utility_evaluation.REASONING:
The required format lists 7 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, total_budget. Now check the final package: 
1. destination – included with city, country, region (fully specified). 
2. travel_dates – included with departure and return dates (fully specified). 
3. transportation – includes airline, class, airports, baggage, total_flight_cost (fully specified). 
4. accommodation – includes property name, star rating, location, room type, amenities, total cost (fully specified). 
5. activities – includes activity name, duration, guide, cancellation, total cost (fully specified). 
6. additional_services – includes dining details (restaurants, cuisine, style, cost) and insurance (fully specified with costs for dining). 
7. total_budget – includes total cost, budget limit, remaining budget (fully specified). 
All 7 items are present and fully detailed.
